name: Phase Coherence Gated Gradients
blurb: Exploratory PIC-GD adaptation with Parallel Muon, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, layer-wise norm scaling, and a late PIC-GD fade into plain Adam/Muon fine-tuning. Latest 8xH100 reference run reached 1.31011907 val_bpb at 14,545,165 bytes total, but this record remains exploratory pending proper multi-seed baseline-vs-PIC-GD evidence.
author: jzgdev
